case_title: ROBERTO BELARMINO TOBAR RIVERA VS. JASON KIRMSE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, ROBERTO BELARMINO TOBAR AS TO DEFENDANT KIRMSE, JASON AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, ROBERTO BELARMINO TOBAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIRMSE, JASON AN INDIVIDUAL $535.80 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $760.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
